positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a lunar landscape viewed from a vibrant galaxy, featuring silhouetted astronaut figures floating among abstract planetary rings and scattered glowing nebulae. The composition should use strong central contrast, with deep space indigo and ultramarine blues contrasting against pop bursts of neon cyan, magenta, and electric lime green. The overall style is modern retro-futuristic line art mixed with screen-print poster aesthetics. The scene must be clean, with crisp lines and strong graphic separation, suitable for high-detail apparel printing.
